about.title: Hi. I'm Coach Amine
about.desc1: I believe fitness is the foundation for a strong, confident, and empowered life. My approach focuses on creating sustainable habits, building resilience, and unlocking your true potential through tailored coaching.
about.desc2: Whether you're starting from scratch or looking to break through a plateau, I'm here to guide you every step of the way. Let's transform your journey into a lasting lifestyle.

method.desc: We don't do quick fixes. We build sustainable habits that will last a lifetime.

method.s2Desc: Clear, concise steps to ensure you stay on track.

method.s4Desc: Strategic increases in intensity to prevent plateaus.

cta.title: Progress without limits
cta.desc: Our proprietary method focuses on sustainable growth. We'll help you break through plateaus and reshape your body with confidence.
cta.small: "I never thought my body could feel this powerful again. Thank you Coach Amine."
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Still not sure if this is the right fit? Find answers to the most common questions below, or reach out to chat.
faq.q1: How long until I see results?
faq.a1: Consistency is key. Most clients feel stronger in 2 weeks and see visible changes in 4-6 weeks.
faq.q2: Do I need a gym membership?
faq.a2: No, every program is tailored to what you have available. We can do bodyweight, bands, or full gym setups.
faq.a3: Yes, comprehensive macro guidelines and nutrition habits are a core part of all premium programs.
faq.a4: We review your progress, metrics, and biofeedback weekly via the app, making necessary adjustments.
faq.q5: What happens after I hit my goal?
faq.a5: We set a new one! Or we transition you into a maintenance phase so you keep your hard-earned results.
foot.ctadesc: The process is simple, structured, and effective.
foot.s1Desc: We review your goals, history, and current routine.
foot.s2Desc: A tailored training and nutrition protocol.
foot.s3Desc: We track your metrics and adapt as you grow.
